summary: Clear‑enough audience recording of a solid summer‑tour opener, highlighted by Black Peter, Black Muddy River and First Victim Or The Crime.
review: The tape captures a decent early‑summer show that many reviewers cite as an “obscure gem,” with strong moments from Black Peter, Black Muddy River and the spacey first set closer First Victim Or The Crime.  Although it’s an audience (aud) source, listeners note the sound is surprisingly clear for a crowd recording, making the performance enjoyable even on modest playback gear.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show 3‑4 stars and praise several songs; recording quality is described as better than typical audience tapes, yielding an overall combined rating around 3.7/5.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe it as the better‑sounding of the available audience recordings – clear enough for lo‑fi setups, with no major dropouts or muffling mentioned.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening summer‑tour show with a solid first set that ends on the spacey First Victim, followed by a generally steady flow that highlights strong mid‑set numbers.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals noted as gritty and expressive (“slow, ragged voice Jerry”).
band_member_comments.Bob: Praised for his vocal banter and for delivering one of his better later tunes with First Victim Or The Crime.
